svg.aria-label: Icon array of 1000 people showing that most positive test results are false positives
svg.title: Base rates and false positives
svg.desc: 1000 people, 10 with the disease; a test flags all 10 plus about 50 healthy people, so most positives are false.
svg.text: Why a 99%-accurate test can still be mostly wrong
60 test positive — but only 10 are sick. Most positives are false.
